title: The Bright Side Of Create
description: This is the modpack page of The Bright Side Of Create.
body:
This modpack is the legacy of "The Dark Side Of Create", for the second season of the server, we decided to pass to Modrinth and we will no longer update our Curseforge page.

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47b31173615fed6a4f19692ce54001b97c3de146.png)

Embark on the Ultimate Adventure

Discover a new frontier in Minecraft 1.20.1 with the Ultimate Adventure modpack. This meticulously crafted collection, along with its dedicated survival server, serves as your gateway to an immersive world brimming with endless possibilities and thrilling adventures. Whether you're a seasoned modded Minecraft veteran or a newcomer eager to explore the wonders of modded gameplay, this server has something for everyone.

 

A World of Wonders

The Ultimate Adventure brings together an impressive collection of mods, including favorites like Ad Astra and Create, among many others, to create a synergistic experience that's both engaging and memorable. Dive into an expansive sandbox world teeming with technology and exploration.

 

Build to Your Heart's Content

This modpack allows for infinite creativity. Whether you're constructing towering fortresses, intricate machines, or simply a cozy cottage, you'll find that every block holds the potential for greatness.

 

Epic Adventures Await

But it's not all about building. The Ultimate Adventure invites you to embark on epic journeys you'll never forget. Whether you venture deep into space or simply explore your closest village, the choice is yours.

 

A Community of Explorers

Join a vibrant and supportive community of fellow adventurers. Whether you need help or are simply looking for a team, we are always happy to assist. Forge lasting friendships as you conquer the depths of this modded world together.

 

Why Choose the Ultimate Adventure Modpack?

- Diverse Mod Collection: Experience the best mods handpicked for synergy and fun.
- Regular Updates: Enjoy continuous improvements and new content.
- Active Community: Find support, friends, and fellow adventurers.
- Unique Gameplay: Unleash your creativity and explore new frontiers.

 

The Ultimate Adventure is more than just a modpack; it's an invitation to explore, create, and enjoy Minecraft in a whole new light. Are you ready to embark on your grand adventure? Download the pack, join the Discord, and experience a new, modded survival server today.

 

If you want to join us and our discord, fell free, it's at your right !

_________________

Credits for mod's that require it:

[GraveStone Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-mod/version/forge-1.20.1-1.0.5)
[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/versions)
[Lucky's Blocky Siege](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckys-blocky-siege)
[Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
[Realm RPG: Sea Dwellers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-sea-dwellers)
[Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs)
[Realm RPG: Pots & Mimics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pots-and-mimics-rpg)
[FXNT BitsNBobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fxnt-bitsnbobs)
[Realm RPG: Fallen Adventurers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers)
